Heading: Innovative Enterprise Solutions, JES2 Management, Virtual Tape Management | Fischer International Systems Corporation
Abstract: Vision / Value/ Service. Fischer: A Trusted Name in Software. Fischer’s vision for software development over the last thirty years has been to provide innovative solutions designed to leverage and enhance the mainframe’s place in the enterprise at all levels. Fischer International Systems Corporation was founded in 1982 by Addison Fischer, a security visionary whose many accomplishments are recognized globally. Our products have and continue to offer multi-platform solutions for security, operations, communication, and identity management that are being used at corporations worldwide. At its heart, Fischer International is a technology company driven by visionaries, all having a single focus: to provide unparalleled value to our customers. This commitment has always been part of our corporate culture. It began in 1982, when we introduced the first PC security product to the marketplace and continues today. Our commitment to providing innovative products and solutions for the new global enterprise will remain our primary mission.
